MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-16-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. MASON MARTINEZ, Esq. of Cattermole Law Group (tel: 650-345-6811) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF ELOA SHARIF.

Matter discussed. The Court notes 35 months have elapsed since the last contact between counsel and his client. The Court notes counsel Gregory Cattermole is not present. Upon conclusion, the Court grants the motion.

Counsel is to prepare and submit a proposed order in the mandatory judicial counsel form MC-053.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/HEK)
